ingredients.item: YIELD: 2 cups (480 ml)
ingredients.original: YIELD: 2 cups (480 ml)

ingredients.item: 1 cup (155 g) cloves garlic, peeled (pre-peeled works as long as they are fresh)
ingredients.original: 1 cup (155 g) cloves garlic, peeled (pre-peeled works as long as they are fresh)

ingredients.item: ½ cup (120 ml) fresh lemon juice
ingredients.original: ½ cup (120 ml) fresh lemon juice

ingredients.item: 2 teaspoons kosher salt
ingredients.original: 2 teaspoons kosher salt

ingredients.item: 2 cups (480 ml) neutral oil (such as avocado oil)
ingredients.original: 2 cups (480 ml) neutral oil (such as avocado oil)

ingredients.item: 1 Cut the garlic cloves in half lengthwise and remove the green germ if necessary. (The germ will make the toum bitter.)
ingredients.original: 1 Cut the garlic cloves in half lengthwise and remove the green germ if necessary. (The germ will make the toum bitter.)

ingredients.item: 2 In a tall jug or jar that fits an immersion blender, place the garlic, lemon juice, and salt and blend until a paste forms and develops some foam, 20 to 30 seconds, depending on the power of your blender.
ingredients.original: 2 In a tall jug or jar that fits an immersion blender, place the garlic, lemon juice, and salt and blend until a paste forms and develops some foam, 20 to 30 seconds, depending on the power of your blender.

ingredients.item: 3 While the blender is still inside the container, add the oil. Start blending, keeping the blades at the bottom of the jar and slowly pulsing it up and down slightly. Do this for 3 to 5 minutes, until the oil and the garlic start to emulsify. (The emulsification will slowly work its way up the jar until the whole sauce is emulsified; see Notes.)
ingredients.original: 3 While the blender is still inside the container, add the oil. Start blending, keeping the blades at the bottom of the jar and slowly pulsing it up and down slightly. Do this for 3 to 5 minutes, until the oil and the garlic start to emulsify. (The emulsification will slowly work its way up the jar until the whole sauce is emulsified; see Notes.)

ingredients.item: 4 Store in an airtight jar in the refrigerator for 3 to 4 weeks.
ingredients.original: 4 Store in an airtight jar in the refrigerator for 3 to 4 weeks.

ingredients.item: YIELD: 2 cups (370 g)
ingredients.original: YIELD: 2 cups (370 g)

ingredients.item: ¾ ounce (21 g) dried chili peppers (such as guajillo, Kashmiri, or any other pepper), sliced lengthwise and seeds and stems removed
ingredients.original: ¾ ounce (21 g) dried chili peppers (such as guajillo, Kashmiri, or any other pepper), sliced lengthwise and seeds and stems removed

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons caraway seeds
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons caraway seeds

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons cumin seeds
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons cumin seeds

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons coriander seeds
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons coriander seeds

ingredients.item: 6½ ounces (180 g) jarred roasted red peppers
ingredients.original: 6½ ounces (180 g) jarred roasted red peppers

ingredients.item: 1 cup (50 g) sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.original: 1 cup (50 g) sun-dried tomatoes

ingredients.item: 4 large cloves garlic, peeled
ingredients.original: 4 large cloves garlic, peeled

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice

ingredients.item: 2 teaspoons grated lemon zest
ingredients.original: 2 teaspoons grated lemon zest
